plot outline: A calamity at Dante and Randal's shops sends them looking for new horizons, but they ultimately settle at Mooby's, a fictional fast-food restaurant. Free from his dead-end job and lodged in a new one, Dante begins to break free of his rut, planning to move away with his clingy fiancée. He is ready to leave the horrors of minimum-wage New Jersey behind, but Randal, always the more hostile of the two, starts to become overwhelmed by his own rancor.
title: Clerks II
akas: The Passion of the Clerks (United States)
クラークス2 バーガーショップ戦記 (Japan, Japanese title)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
